story.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face address security incident during model evaluation

draft:
I'm closely following the recent security incident during model evaluation at OpenAI and Hugging Face. 
The incident highlights the risks of exposing sensitive data during model testing. 
I'm concerned about the potential impact on AI development. 
What steps can we take to prevent similar incidents in the future?
#AIsecurity #MachineLearning #ModelEvaluation
